title: Inbox Note Frontmatter — project_id amendment
description: Additive patch to specs/001-vaultcontrol-architecture/contracts/inbox-note.frontmatter.schema.json. Adds an optional top-level project_id field. Notes omitting the field resolve to registry.default_project_id at job-creation time; the inbox note itself is not rewritten.

project_id.description: Owning project. Optional; null/absent means registry.default_project_id.
